ddls:
CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "series_code" TEXT /* Code of the population growth series */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population growth rate */,
  "value" REAL /* Population growth rate for the specific year */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data entry */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_series_code FOREIGN KEY ("series_code") REFERENCES series ("series_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the population growth series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the population growth series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the series */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the series */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Subregion to which the country belongs */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Current population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the country data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, administrator) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
